CVE-2018-12932.title: PlayEnhMetaFileRecord in enhmetafile.c in Wine 3.7 allows attacke ...
CVE-2018-12932.description: PlayEnhMetaFileRecord in enhmetafile.c in Wine 3.7 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (heap-based buffer overflow) or possibly have unspecified other impact by triggering a large pAlphaBlend->cbBitsSrc value.

CVE-2018-12933.title: PlayEnhMetaFileRecord in enhmetafile.c in Wine 3.7 allows attacke ...
CVE-2018-12933.description: PlayEnhMetaFileRecord in enhmetafile.c in Wine 3.7 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (out-of-bounds write) or possibly have unspecified other impact because the attacker controls the pCreatePen->ihPen array index.
